data.title: 国际服steam客户端维护#2
data.summary: [7/10 (Thu) STEAM Client Data Patch Notice] On 7/10 (Thu) at 9:55 AM (UTC), a live patch was applied
data.body:
[7/10 (Thu) STEAM Client Data Patch Notice]

On 7/10 (Thu) at 9:55 AM (UTC), a live patch was applied to improve game stability and performance. Please log in again after the patch to ensure it is applied correctly.

Target: STEAM Client

Impact: While the patch is in progress, you can still engage in gameplay. The updated content will be installed upon Steam re-entry.

* If the update button is not active, please try restarting the STEAM launcher.

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3029152

#BlueArchive
![20250713_150006[1].jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/4954/ywX176FZE9O7QadZ8RBaylwIX83Wx8us.jpg)
